front.title: Intent-Based Network Management in SRv6 Networks

author.organization: Department of Computer Science and Engineering

abstract.t: This document describes secure network management in Segment Routing version six (SRv6) networks. It proposes a framework empowered with Intent-Based Networking (IBN). The Intent-Based Network Management (IBNM) in this document specifies an architectural framework with system components and interfaces. Also, this framework builds on Interface to Network Security Functions (I2NSF).
